Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 83 

GAP_DAYS_MONPP_3M 

LABEL: Gap Split Network Standard Mail Order — Number of Days in Three-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a three-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using 
mail order non-preferred pharmacy (MONPP; also known as a standard mail order pharmacy within a 
split network) during the coverage gap phase of the
